es.title: Video: Glándulas endocrinas
es.description: Si alguna vez te has preguntado cómo funciona el sistema endócrino (el sistema que produce hormonas), simplemente mira este video para encontrar la respuesta.

en.title: How Does the Endocrine System Work? (Video)
en.description: What Does the Endocrine System Do? If you ever wondered what your endocrine system (the system that produces hormones) does, this movie has the answers!
